conservative.name: Suffer Not the Witch
conservative.requirements: 7 favour. Target spellcaster within medium range

success.description: You lock wills with the witch and force him to confront Sigmar's holy wrath. The target loses 2 power, and suffers 2 wounds, 2 fatigue, and 2 stress
As above, but the target loses all his power instead

boon.description: While this blessing is recharging, all Spells cast within medium range of you add to their dice pool

sigmarsComet.description: You may choose 1 of the target's available spells that are not currently recharging. Add 3 recharge tokens to that spell

reckless.name: Suffer Not the Witch
reckless.requirements: 7 favour. Target spellcaster within medium range

success.description: You lock wills with the witch and force him to confront Sigmar's holy wrath. The target loses 2 power, and suffers 2 wounds, 2 fatigue, and 2 stress
As above, but the target loses 4 power instead
As above, but the target loses 5 power instead

boon.description: If the target loses more power than he has available, then he suffers 1 critical wound for each power he loses in excess of his current power

sigmarsComet.description: You may choose 1 of the target's available spells that are not currently recharging. Add 3 recharge tokens to that spell
